response:
1. area of zen garden = πr²  
   area for dining tables = 2 × πr²  
   total area = 20 × 15 = 300  
   total area = area of zen garden + area for dining tables = πr² + 2πr² = 3πr²  
   3πr² = 300  
   r² = 300 / (3π) = 100 / π  
   r = √(100 / π) ≈ 5.64 m  

2. radius of fountain = r / 3 ≈ 5.64 / 3 ≈ 1.88 m  
   surface area of cylinder (excluding base) = 2πrh = 2π × 1.88 × 1.5 ≈ 17.8 m²  
   cost = 17.8 × 50 = 890  

ans: 5.64  
ans: 890
